## 1. Repo Map

```
/Users/romitsoley/Work/                 ← monorepo root (THIS FILE lives here)
├── pnpm-workspace.yaml                 ← workspace globs
├── tsconfig.base.json                  ← path aliases: @exxat/ds/*, @exxat/student/*
├── turbo.json                          ← build/dev/lint/type-check pipelines
├── exxat-ds/                           ← Admin DS submodule — READ ONLY
│   └── packages/ui/                    ← @exxat-ds/ui (package name confirmed)
│       └── src/
│           ├── theme.css               ← CSS custom properties ONLY — import this in admin apps
│           ├── globals.css             ← full DS CSS incl. Tailwind — DO NOT import in product apps
│           └── index.ts                ← all component + hook + util exports
├── studentUX/                          ← Student DS submodule — READ ONLY
│   └── src/
│       ├── styles/globals.css          ← Student DS tokens + font imports — import in student apps
│       └── components/
│           ├── shared/index.ts         ← composite components (DataTable, FilterBar, templates…)
│           └── ui/                     ← shadcn-based primitives (individual .tsx files)
├── apps/
│   ├── exam-management/
│   │   ├── admin/                      ← @exxat/exam-management-admin · port 3001 · ACTIVE BUILD
│   │   └── student/                    ← @exxat/exam-management-student · port 3002 · Scaffolded
│   ├── patient-log/                    ← NOT YET SCAFFOLDED · ports 3003-3004
│   ├── pce/                            ← NOT YET SCAFFOLDED · ports 3005-3006
│   ├── skills-checklist/               ← NOT YET SCAFFOLDED · ports 3007-3008
│   └── learning-contracts/             ← NOT YET SCAFFOLDED · ports 3009-3010
└── docs/
```

## 3. Design System Sources

### Admin DS
- **Package name (confirmed):** `@exxat-ds/ui`
- **Source path:** `exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/` (git submodule — READ ONLY, NEVER EDIT)
- **Remote:** https://github.com/ExxatDesign/Exxat-DS-Workspace.git
- **Update command:** `git submodule update --remote --merge` (run from monorepo root)
- **Import alias in apps:** `@exxat/ds` → resolves to `exxat-ds/` via next.config.ts webpack alias
- **Component import:** `import { Button, Sidebar, ... } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'`
- **CSS import (in app/globals.css):** `@import '../../../../exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/theme.css'`

### Student DS
- **Source path:** `studentUX/src/` (git submodule — READ ONLY, NEVER EDIT)
- **Remote:** ExxatDesign/studentUX (Vite/React project, not an npm-publishable package)
- **Update command:** `git submodule update --remote --merge` (run from monorepo root)
- **Import alias in apps:** `@exxat/student` → resolves to `studentUX/src/` via next.config.ts webpack alias
- **UI import:** `import { Button } from '@exxat/student/components/ui/button'`
- **Shared import:** `import { DataTable, FilterBar } from '@exxat/student/components/shared'`
- **CSS import (in app/globals.css):** `@import '../../../../studentUX/src/styles/globals.css'`

## 4. Workspace Config (confirmed from actual files)

### pnpm-workspace.yaml
```yaml
packages:
  - 'exxat-ds/packages/*'
  - 'apps/exam-management/*'
  - 'apps/patient-log/*'
  - 'apps/pce/*'
  - 'apps/skills-checklist/*'
  - 'apps/learning-contracts/*'
```

### turbo.json
```json
{
  "$schema": "https://turbo.build/schema.json",
  "tasks": {
    "build": { "dependsOn": ["^build"], "outputs": [".next/**", "!.next/cache/**"] },
    "dev": { "cache": false, "persistent": true },
    "lint": {},
    "type-check": { "outputs": [] }
  }
}
```

### tsconfig.base.json path aliases
```json
"paths": {
  "@exxat/ds/*":      ["./exxat-ds/*"],
  "@exxat/student/*": ["./studentUX/src/*"]
}
```

### next.config.ts (admin apps — confirmed from exam-management/admin/next.config.ts)
```ts
webpack(config) {
  config.resolve.alias = {
    ...config.resolve.alias,
    '@exxat/ds':      path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../exxat-ds'),
    '@exxat/student': path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../studentUX/src'),
  }
  return config
}
```

### next.config.ts (student apps — confirmed from exam-management/student/next.config.ts)
```ts
webpack: (config) => {
  config.resolve.alias = {
    ...config.resolve.alias,
    '@exxat/student': path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../studentUX/src'),
  }
  return config
}
```

## 5. Admin DS — CSS Token Reference

All tokens from `exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/theme.css`. Use via `var(--token-name)`.

### Typography
```
--font-heading           "ivypresto-text"
--font-sans              "Inter", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif
--text-xs                0.6875rem (11px at 16px root — minimum readable UI copy)
```

### Border Radius
```
--radius                 0.5rem (8px base)
--radius-sm              4px
--radius-md              8px
--radius-lg              12px
--radius-xl              16px
--radius-2xl             20px
--radius-3xl             24px
```

### Brand Colors (Exxat One · Lavender · hue 286.1)
```
--brand-tint             oklch(0.9676 0.016 286.1)   ← primary brand surface
--brand-tint-light       oklch(0.993 0.007 286.1)
--brand-tint-subtle      oklch(0.935 0.024 286.1)
--brand-color            oklch(0.50 0.14 286.1)      ← interactive accent
--brand-color-light      oklch(0.78 0.09 286.1)
--brand-color-dark       oklch(0.38 0.11 286.1)
--brand-color-deep       oklch(0.28 0.085 286.1)
--brand-foreground       oklch(0.985 0 0)            ← text on brand bg
--brand-preview-one      var(--brand-tint)
--brand-preview-prism    oklch(0.57 0.24 342)
```

### Semantic Colors (light mode)
```
--background             oklch(1 0 0)
--foreground             oklch(0.145 0 0)             ← 17:1 on white
--card                   oklch(1 0 0)
--card-foreground        oklch(0.145 0 0)
--popover                oklch(1 0 0)
--popover-foreground     oklch(0.145 0 0)
--primary                oklch(0.3457 0.0052 286.13)
--primary-foreground     oklch(0.985 0 0)
--secondary              oklch(0.95 0.0058 264.53)
--secondary-foreground   oklch(0.082 0 0)
--muted                  oklch(0.945 0.002 270)
--muted-foreground       oklch(0.50 0.012 270)        ← 5.5:1 on white
--accent                 oklch(0.925 0.005 260)
--accent-foreground      oklch(0.082 0 0)
--destructive            oklch(0.55 0.22 25)          ← 5.1:1 on white
--destructive-foreground oklch(1 0 0)
```

### Borders and Inputs
```
--border                 oklch(0.92 0.002 270)        ← decorative (no AA required)
--border-control         oklch(0.82 0.004 270)        ← subtle, layout use only
--border-control-3       oklch(0.6196 0.0092 270)     ← ~3:1 on white (minimum for fields)
--border-control-35      oklch(0.25 0.01 270)         ← ~3.5:1 (recommended for inputs)
--control-border         var(--border-control-3)      ← default form-field border alias
--input                  oklch(0.6694 0.0063 264.52)
--input-background       oklch(0.97 0.002 270)
--ring                   oklch(0.25 0 0)              ← focus ring (3:1+ contrast)
--overlay                color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 5%, transparent)
```

### Sidebar (light mode)
```
--sidebar                             var(--brand-tint)
--sidebar-foreground                  oklch(0.145 0 0)
--sidebar-primary                     oklch(0.082 0 0)
--sidebar-primary-foreground          oklch(0.985 0 0)
--sidebar-accent                      oklch(0.945 0.025 286.1)
--sidebar-accent-foreground           oklch(0.3457 0.0052 286.13)
--sidebar-border                      oklch(0.92 0.025 286.1)
--sidebar-ring                        oklch(0.25 0 0)
--sidebar-section-label-foreground    color-mix(in oklch, var(--sidebar-foreground) 58%, var(--sidebar))
--secondary-panel-bg                  oklch(0.99 0.008 286.1)
--theme-color-chrome                  #f3f2f8
```

```
--interactive-hover              var(--muted)

--interactive-hover-soft         color-mix(in oklch, var(--muted) 40%, transparent)

--interactive-hover-strong       color-mix(in oklch, var(--muted) 70%, transparent)
--interactive-hover-row          color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent) 50%, transparent)
```

### DataTable
```
--dt-header-bg        var(--background)
--dt-row-bg           var(--background)
--dt-row-hover        oklch(0.972 0.001 270)
--dt-row-selected     oklch(0.962 0.003 260)
--dt-row-selected-fg  var(--foreground)
--dt-group-bg         oklch(0.972 0.001 270)
--sticky-edge-fade    oklch(0 0 0 / 0.08)
```
Note: Define these in `app/globals.css` of each admin app (not in theme.css).

### Avatars and Insights
```
--avatar-initials-bg        color-mix(in oklch, var(--brand-color) 14%, oklch(1 0 0))
--avatar-initials-fg        var(--brand-color-dark)
--insight-severity-warning-bg    color-mix(in oklch, var(--chart-4) 15%, transparent)
--insight-severity-warning-fg    color-mix(in oklch, var(--chart-4) 75%, var(--foreground))
--insight-severity-info-bg       color-mix(in oklch, var(--chart-1) 14%, transparent)
--insight-severity-info-fg       color-mix(in oklch, var(--chart-1) 75%, var(--foreground))
```

### Conditional Formatting
```
--conditional-rule-green   color-mix(in oklch, var(--chart-2) 22%, transparent)
--conditional-rule-yellow  color-mix(in oklch, var(--chart-4) 30%, transparent)
--conditional-rule-blue    color-mix(in oklch, var(--chart-1) 22%, transparent)
--conditional-rule-red     color-mix(in oklch, var(--destructive) 22%, transparent)
--conditional-rule-purple  color-mix(in oklch, var(--brand-color) 22%, transparent)
--conditional-rule-orange  color-mix(in oklch, var(--chart-5) 25%, transparent)
```

### Prism Banner
```
--banner-prism-bg    oklch(0.97 0.02 343)   ← rose; always fixed regardless of theme
```

### Density, Scaling, Touch Targets
```
--scaling               1
--control-height        calc(40px * var(--scaling))
--control-height-sm     calc(32px * var(--scaling))
--control-height-touch  44px               ← WCAG 2.5.5 minimum touch target
--control-padding-y     calc(8px * var(--scaling))
--control-padding-x     calc(12px * var(--scaling))
--table-row-height      calc(48px * var(--scaling))
```

### Transitions
```
--transition-fast    0.15s ease
--transition-normal  0.25s ease-in-out
--transition-colors  color 0.15s ease, background-color 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease
```

### Shadows
```
--shadow-sm   oklch(0 0 0 / 0.08) 0px 1px 2px 0px
--shadow-md   oklch(0 0 0 / 0.08) 0px 2px 4px -1px, oklch(0 0 0 / 0.06) 0px 1px 2px
--shadow-lg   oklch(0 0 0 / 0.10) 0px 4px 8px -2px, oklch(0 0 0 / 0.06) 0px 2px 4px
```

---

## 6. Admin DS — Theme System

Themes are applied via CSS classes on `<html>`. There is NO `themes.ts` or `applyTheme()` function.
Use the `useAppTheme()` hook from `@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src`.

### Theme Classes
```
.theme-one      (also: .theme-lavender)  ← Exxat One · Lavender · hue 286.1
.theme-prism    (also: .theme-rose)      ← Exxat Prism · Rose · hue 342-343
```
Dark mode: add `.dark` class alongside theme class (e.g., `<html class="theme-one dark">`).

### useAppTheme Hook
```ts
import { useAppTheme } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'

// Types (from use-app-theme.ts)
type Brand = "one" | "prism"
type ContrastPreference = "system" | "normal" | "high"
type ContrastMode = "normal" | "high"

const { brand, setBrand, contrastPref, contrast, setContrast, mounted } = useAppTheme()
// setBrand("one") → applies .theme-one to <html>
// setBrand("prism") → applies .theme-prism to <html>
// Persisted to localStorage automatically
```

```
useAppTheme       ← Brand + contrast theme management
useCoachMark      ← Guided onboarding coach marks
useMobile         ← Mobile breakpoint detection
useModKeyLabel    ← OS-correct modifier key label (⌘ vs Ctrl)
```

```
utils        ← from lib/utils (cn(), etc.)
date-filter  ← from lib/date-filter
```

## 10. Font Loading

### Admin Apps — required in every layout.tsx
```tsx
<head>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://use.typekit.net/wuk5wqn.css" />
  <script
    src="https://kit.fontawesome.com/d9bd5774e0.js"
    crossOrigin="anonymous"
    async
  />
</head>
```

Font Awesome icon class patterns (use with `aria-hidden="true"`):
- `fa-light fa-[icon]` — default/inactive states
- `fa-regular fa-[icon]` — secondary interactive
- `fa-solid fa-[icon]` — active/selected states

### Student Apps — fonts already in studentUX/src/styles/globals.css
- Google Fonts (Inter): loaded via `@import url("https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:...")`
- Typekit: `@import url("https://use.typekit.net/kmo8bbz.css")`
- Font Awesome Pro: `@import url('https://kit.fontawesome.com/bff072b36d.css')`
- Do NOT double-import. They are already loaded when you import globals.css.

---

## 11. Absolute Rules — Apply to ALL Products

- NEVER edit files in `exxat-ds/` or `studentUX/` — they are read-only submodules
- NEVER commit to main — all work stays on feature branches
- NEVER hardcode hex or rgb colors — use CSS custom properties only (`var(--token)`)
- NEVER recreate Button, Badge, Input, Avatar, Dialog, Sheet, Sidebar, Dropdown, Tooltip, DataTable — import from DS
- NEVER use a raw `<button>` element — every button must be DS `Button` with explicit `variant` and `size`
- NEVER use `white` in `color-mix()` — always use `var(--background)` instead
- Badge shape override: use `className="rounded"` to get rectangular (4px) shape vs DS pill default; custom colors go in `style` prop
- NEVER use toast (`toast()` / Sonner) for product feedback — use banners or inline status
- NEVER build list pages with raw `<table>` or third-party grids
- ALWAYS add `'use client'` to interactive React components
- ALWAYS use Font Awesome icons with `aria-hidden="true"`
- ALWAYS use the correct DS for the app type (Admin DS for admin, Student DS for student)
- ALWAYS import `theme.css` (not `globals.css`) from Admin DS in product admin apps
- ALWAYS read `exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/index.ts` before importing admin components
- ALWAYS read `studentUX/src/components/shared/index.ts` and `ui/` before importing student components
- Touch targets: minimum 44px on mobile (WCAG 2.5.5) — use `--control-height-touch`
- Border contrast: use `--border-control-35` for form field borders (≥3.5:1)
- Focus ring: `--ring` token only — never remove focus outlines

---

## 12. Admin App Patterns (from exxat-ds/apps/web/AGENTS.md)

### Page Shell
- Primary data-list pages MUST use `ListPageTemplate` + `DataTable`
- `ListPageTemplate` provides: view tabs (table/list/board/dashboard), search, `TablePropertiesDrawer`, export, optional `KeyMetrics` strip

### Data Views
- All view types (table/list/board/dashboard) share the same `useTableState` instance
- Board kanban cards: compose `ListPageBoardCard` from `components/data-views/list-page-board-card.tsx`

### Feedback / Messaging
- MUST NOT use toast (`toast()`) or Sonner for product feedback
- Use `LocalBanner` / `SystemBanner`, inline status, or dialog/drawer

### Component Reuse
- Match naming, imports, and patterns of reference implementations
- `DataTable` MUST NOT be replaced with raw `<table>` or third-party grids
- Status badges: define in `lib/list-status-badges.ts` — never duplicate in feature files

### Keyboard Shortcuts
- Show `Kbd`/`KbdGroup` where users discover actions
- Table search: `⌘K` / `Ctrl+K`
- Use `useModKeyLabel` for OS-correct labels

---

**Exam Management — Admin (Question Bank)**
- App: `apps/exam-management/admin/`
- Design reference: https://www.magicpatterns.com/c/kq8sem88owbpxfzmopj8in/preview
- QB components ready to migrate: QBView, QBViewTop, QBViewBottom, QBViewMain, QBFolderRows, QBQuestionRow, QBFilterSheet, QBModals, QBFacultyModals, QBAssignModal, QBData, QBStyles, QBInlineHelpers, Portal, QuestionBankFull

---

## 14. Admin DS — Component API Reference (confirmed from source)

> Exact prop signatures, variants, and composition templates from `exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/components/ui/`.
> Copy the template → swap your data. Do not guess props.

---

### Button

```ts
import { Button } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
// variant: default | outline | secondary | ghost | destructive | link
// size:    default(h-9) | sm(h-8) | lg(h-10) | xs(h-6) | icon(36px) | icon-sm(32px) | icon-xs(24px) | icon-lg(40px)
// asChild: boolean — renders as Radix Slot
```

| Variant | Use for |
|---------|---------|
| `default` | Primary CTA — one per view |
| `outline` | Secondary action beside a primary |
| `ghost` | Toolbar, icon actions, row actions, Ask Leo |
| `secondary` | Tertiary, low-emphasis |
| `destructive` | Delete / danger (red tint bg + red text) |

**Icon-only button (MUST have aria-label + Tooltip):**
```tsx
<Tooltip>
  <TooltipTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="ghost" size="icon-sm" aria-label="Delete">
      <i className="fa-light fa-trash-can" aria-hidden="true" />
    </Button>
  </TooltipTrigger>
  <TooltipContent>Delete</TooltipContent>
</Tooltip>
```

**Ask Leo (admin — AskLeoButton from studentUX is incompatible):**
```tsx
<Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="gap-1.5 text-xs font-medium" aria-label="Ask Leo AI">
  <i className="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-star-christmas text-xs" style={{ color: 'var(--brand-color)' }} aria-hidden="true" />
  Ask Leo
</Button>
```
→ Icon is always `fa-duotone fa-solid fa-star-christmas`. Never `fa-sparkles`, never `fa-plus`.
→ Variant: `outline` — gives DS `border-input` visible border. Never `ghost` (ghost is `border-transparent`).
→ Color is `style={{ color: 'var(--brand-color)' }}` — not a Tailwind class.

**Split button:**
```tsx
<div style={{ display: 'flex' }}>
  <Button variant="default" style={{ borderRadius: '7px 0 0 7px' }}>Add Question</Button>
  <Button variant="default" style={{ borderRadius: '0 7px 7px 0', borderLeft: '1px solid var(--qb-split-divider)', paddingInline: 8 }}>
    <i className="fa-light fa-chevron-down" aria-hidden="true" style={{ fontSize: 10 }} />
  </Button>
</div>
```

---

### Badge

```ts
import { Badge } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
// variant: default | secondary | destructive | outline | ghost | link
```

| Variant | Use for |
|---------|---------|
| `default` | Count badges, high-emphasis status (dark bg) |
| `secondary` | Role, type, metadata (muted bg) — most common |
| `destructive` | Error / rejected state |
| `outline` | Low-emphasis label, no fill |

**Custom color override (keep DS structure, override via style):**
```tsx
<Badge variant="secondary" style={{ backgroundColor: 'var(--qb-trust-senior-bg)', color: 'var(--qb-trust-senior-color)' }}>
  Senior
</Badge>
```
→ Never build a `<span>` with hand-rolled padding/radius for something Badge handles.

---

### DropdownMenu

```ts
import {
  DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuLabel, DropdownMenuShortcut,
  DropdownMenuSub, DropdownMenuSubTrigger, DropdownMenuSubContent,
  DropdownMenuCheckboxItem, DropdownMenuRadioGroup, DropdownMenuRadioItem,
} from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
// DropdownMenuContent: align(start=default|center|end) sideOffset(4)
//   default width = trigger width — always pass className="w-44" (or w-48, w-56) to fix width
// DropdownMenuItem:    variant(default|destructive) inset(boolean)
```

**Row actions (⋯ per row):**
```tsx
<DropdownMenu>
  <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="ghost" size="icon-sm" aria-label="Row actions">
      <i className="fa-regular fa-ellipsis" aria-hidden="true" />
    </Button>
  </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-44">
    <DropdownMenuItem onClick={handleEdit}>
      <i className="fa-light fa-pen" aria-hidden="true" />
      Edit
    </DropdownMenuItem>
    <DropdownMenuSeparator />
    <DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive" onClick={handleDelete}>
      <i className="fa-light fa-trash-can" aria-hidden="true" />
      Delete
    </DropdownMenuItem>
  </DropdownMenuContent>
</DropdownMenu>
```
→ Never use `Portal` + fixed `<div>` for a menu. Always `DropdownMenu`.
→ `asChild` on trigger is required.
→ Destructive: use `variant="destructive"` — never color manually.

---

### Sheet

```ts
import { Sheet, SheetTrigger, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetDescription, SheetFooter, SheetClose } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
// SheetContent: side(top|right|bottom|left=right) showCloseButton(true) showOverlay(true)
```

**Standard tray (full-height, with overlay):**
```tsx
<Sheet open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
  <SheetContent side="right">
    <SheetHeader>
      <SheetTitle>Filter Questions</SheetTitle>
      <SheetDescription>Narrow the list.</SheetDescription>
    </SheetHeader>
    {/* body */}
    <SheetFooter>
      <Button onClick={onApply}>Apply</Button>
      <SheetClose asChild><Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button></SheetClose>
    </SheetFooter>
  </SheetContent>
</Sheet>
```

**Floating properties panel (no overlay, no close button):**
```tsx
<Sheet open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
  <SheetContent
    side="right"
    showOverlay={false}
    showCloseButton={false}
    className="w-80 sm:max-w-80 p-0 gap-0 flex flex-col border border-border shadow-xl rounded-xl overflow-hidden"
    style={{ top: '0.5rem', bottom: '0.5rem', right: '0.5rem', height: 'calc(100vh - 1rem)' }}
  >
    <SheetTitle className="sr-only">Properties</SheetTitle>
    {/* content */}
  </SheetContent>
</Sheet>
```

---

### Dialog

```ts
import { Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogClose } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
// DialogContent: showCloseButton(true) overlayClassName className(sm:max-w-sm default)
// DialogFooter:  showCloseButton(false) — adds "Close" outline button when true
```

```tsx
<Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
  <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-md">
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Confirm Delete</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>This cannot be undone.</DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
    {/* body */}
    <DialogFooter showCloseButton>
      <Button variant="destructive" onClick={handleDelete}>Delete</Button>
    </DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```
→ `DialogTitle` is required — add `className="sr-only"` if visually hidden.
→ Never use `role="dialog"` on a raw `<div>`.

---

### Popover

```ts
import { Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
// PopoverContent: align(start|center|end) side(top|right|bottom|left) sideOffset(4)
```

```tsx
<Popover>
  <PopoverTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="ghost" size="icon-sm" aria-label="Version history">
      <i className="fa-light fa-clock-rotate-left" aria-hidden="true" />
    </Button>
  </PopoverTrigger>
  <PopoverContent align="end" className="w-72 p-3">
    {/* content */}
  </PopoverContent>
</Popover>
```
→ Never use `Portal` + fixed `<div>` for a flyout. Always `Popover`.
→ `PopoverContent` portals automatically — never wrap in Portal manually.

---

### Tooltip

```ts
import { Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
```

→ `TooltipProvider` MUST exist at root — already in `app-sidebar.tsx`. Don't add a second.
→ `delayDuration` defaults to `0`. Arrow is automatic — don't add custom ones.

```tsx
<Tooltip>
  <TooltipTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="ghost" size="icon-sm" aria-label="Filter">
      <i className="fa-light fa-sliders" aria-hidden="true" />
    </Button>
  </TooltipTrigger>
  <TooltipContent>Filter</TooltipContent>
</Tooltip>
```

---

### Tabs

```ts
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
// TabsList: variant(default|line)   Tabs: orientation(horizontal|vertical)
```

**Pill tabs (default — lavender-tinted bg):**
```tsx
<Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab}>
  <TabsList>
    <TabsTrigger value="all">All Questions</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="my">My Questions</TabsTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="all">…</TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="my">…</TabsContent>
</Tabs>
```

**Line tabs (underline indicator, no bg fill):**
```tsx
<TabsList variant="line">
  <TabsTrigger value="overview">Overview</TabsTrigger>
  <TabsTrigger value="details">Details</TabsTrigger>
</TabsList>
```

---

### Checkbox

```ts
import { Checkbox } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
// checked: boolean | 'indeterminate'   onCheckedChange: (checked) => void
```

```tsx
{/* Standard */}
<div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  <Checkbox id="draft" checked={isDraft} onCheckedChange={setIsDraft} />
  <Label htmlFor="draft">Include drafts</Label>
</div>

{/* Select-all indeterminate */}
<Checkbox
  checked={selected.length === 0 ? false : selected.length === total ? true : 'indeterminate'}
  onCheckedChange={checked => setSelected(checked ? allIds : [])}
  aria-label="Select all"
/>
```

---

### Select

```ts
import { Select, SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectValue, SelectGroup, SelectLabel } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
// SelectTrigger: size(default=h-8 | sm=h-7)  — default is w-fit, add className to fix width
// SelectContent: position(item-aligned|popper) align(center)
```

```tsx
<Select value={value} onValueChange={setValue}>
  <SelectTrigger className="w-[180px]">
    <SelectValue placeholder="Select difficulty…" />
  </SelectTrigger>
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectItem value="easy">Easy</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="medium">Medium</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="hard">Hard</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>
```

---

### Input / InputGroup

```ts
import { Input } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
import { InputGroup, InputGroupAddon } from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
// InputGroupAddon: align(start|end|inline-start|inline-end)
```

```tsx
{/* Plain input — always pair with Label */}
<div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
  <Label htmlFor="title">Question Title</Label>
  <Input id="title" placeholder="Enter title…" value={title} onChange={e => setTitle(e.target.value)} />
</div>

{/* Search with icon addon */}
<InputGroup>
  <Input placeholder="Search…" />
  <InputGroupAddon align="end">
    <i className="fa-light fa-magnifying-glass text-muted-foreground" aria-hidden="true" />
  </InputGroupAddon>
</InputGroup>
```

---

### Field (form field wrapper)

```ts
import {
  Field, FieldLabel, FieldDescription, FieldError,
  FieldGroup, FieldSet,
  FieldContent, FieldTitle, FieldLegend, FieldSeparator,
} from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
// orientation: vertical(default) | horizontal | responsive
// FieldError.errors: Array<{ message?: string } | undefined>  — renders all unique messages
//   compatible with react-hook-form's FieldError objects; NOT a string[]
```

```tsx
<Field orientation="vertical">
  <FieldLabel htmlFor="stem">Question Stem</FieldLabel>
  <FieldDescription>Write a clear, concise question.</FieldDescription>
  <Textarea id="stem" />
  <FieldError errors={[formState.errors.stem]} />
</Field>

{/* Horizontal: label + control inline */}
<Field orientation="horizontal">
  <FieldLabel htmlFor="active">Active</FieldLabel>
  <ToggleSwitch id="active" checked={isActive} onChange={setIsActive} />
</Field>
```

---

### Sidebar

```ts
import {
  Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarHeader, SidebarFooter,
  SidebarGroup, SidebarGroupContent, SidebarGroupLabel, SidebarGroupAction,
  SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarMenuAction,
  SidebarMenuBadge, SidebarMenuSkeleton,
  SidebarMenuSub, SidebarMenuSubButton, SidebarMenuSubItem,
  SidebarSeparator, SidebarInput, SidebarRail,
  SidebarInset, SidebarTrigger, SidebarProvider, useSidebar,
} from '@exxat/ds/packages/ui/src'
// useSidebar(): { state('expanded'|'collapsed'), open, setOpen, openMobile, setOpenMobile, toggleSidebar, isMobile }
```

**Required shell (admin layout.tsx):**
```tsx
<SidebarProvider className="h-svh">          {/* h-svh REQUIRED */}
  <Sidebar variant="inset" collapsible="icon"> {/* variant="inset" REQUIRED */}
    <SidebarHeader>…</SidebarHeader>
    <SidebarContent>…</SidebarContent>
    <SidebarFooter>…</SidebarFooter>
  </Sidebar>
  <SidebarInset className="flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
    {children}
  </SidebarInset>
</SidebarProvider>
```
→ `h-svh` on `SidebarProvider` — without it the layout breaks.
→ `variant="inset"` on `Sidebar` — without it `SidebarInset` has no rounded corners.
→ `toggleSidebar()` controls the MAIN sidebar only. QB library panel is a separate `<aside>`.
→ Keyboard shortcut `⌘B` / `Ctrl+B` is wired automatically by `SidebarProvider`.

---

### Icon Rules (Font Awesome Pro)

```tsx
<i className="fa-{weight} fa-{name}" aria-hidden="true" />
```

| Weight | Use |
|--------|-----|
| `fa-light` | Default / inactive / secondary — most common |
| `fa-regular` | Interactive secondary, hover-revealed |
| `fa-solid` | Active / selected / on state |
| `fa-duotone fa-solid` | Brand icons only (Leo AI) |

**Leo AI — exact and only correct class:**
```tsx
<i className="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-star-christmas text-xs" style={{ color: 'var(--brand-color)' }} aria-hidden="true" />
```

**Font sizes in style objects:**
```
fontSize: 9   badge indicators     fontSize: 13  sidebar nav
fontSize: 11  tight row cells      fontSize: 14  standard buttons
fontSize: 12  default inline       fontSize: 16  header actions
```

**Icon name map:**
```
fa-ellipsis          Row actions ⋯ (regular=inactive, solid=open)
fa-plus              Add / create
fa-pen               Edit
fa-trash-can         Delete
fa-copy              Duplicate
fa-xmark             Close / dismiss
fa-check             Confirm / selected
fa-sliders           Filter / properties
fa-magnifying-glass  Search
fa-folder            Folder (solid=open/active)
fa-folder-open       Folder open state
fa-rectangle-list    Question set
fa-bookmark          Bookmark (regular=off, solid=on)
fa-lock-keyhole      Private / locked
fa-thumbtack         Pinned
fa-clock-rotate-left Version history
fa-calendar-days     Date picker
fa-chevron-down      Dropdown indicator
fa-chevron-right     Breadcrumb / expand
fa-sidebar           Toggle nav sidebar
fa-gear              Settings
fa-share-nodes       Share
fa-sparkles          AI / smart (generic) — NOT Leo
fa-star-christmas    Leo AI only (duotone solid)
fa-circle-info       Info
fa-bell              Alert / notification
fa-arrow-up          Sort ascending
fa-arrow-down        Sort descending
fa-arrow-down-to-line Download
fa-arrow-up-from-bracket Upload / export
fa-users             Team / collaborators
fa-graduation-cap    Course
fa-flag              Flag
fa-star              Favorite / star
```

---

## 15. How to Start a New Product

1. Read `apps/[product]/CLAUDE.md` for product-specific context
2. Create admin next.config.ts with both `@exxat/ds` and `@exxat/student` webpack aliases
3. Create student next.config.ts with `@exxat/student` webpack alias
4. Import `theme.css` in admin `app/globals.css`; import `studentUX/src/styles/globals.css` in student
5. Add Typekit + Font Awesome to admin `app/layout.tsx`
6. Add `<html class="theme-one">` to admin layout (default brand = Exxat One Lavender)
7. Import DS components — never recreate them
